subject: Plan transcript node export
description: Use OpenTargets target transcriptIds/transcripts to plan and implement nodes/transcript.parquet plus gene_has_transcript/transcript_encodes_protein where graph-valid.
result: Implemented transcript node export from OpenTargets target transcripts. Promoted nodes/transcript.parquet (507,365 ENST nodes), edges/gene_has_transcript.parquet (507,365), and edges/transcript_encodes_protein.parquet (233,995). Final GCS validate PASS: 11 node types, 27 edge types, 3,975,209 nodes, 26,301,273 edges, total_dangling_edges=0.
